expectedAssertions: report-quality preserves the design coherence boundary actionability question in JSON and Markdown
report-quality does not emit recursive fixtureCandidates for an already-materialized synthetic fixture
the fixture keeps scopeBoundary.shipguardOnly and targetAppsReadOnly explicit
design reports expose designCoherenceBoundary with sourceInventory, coherenceRisks, separationChecks, shipguardNextAction, appWorkAuthorization, and proofBoundary
shipguardNextAction names owner, expected artifact, success condition, and failure meaning
shareable output contains no local absolute paths or private app identifiers
privateDataPolicy: Synthetic public fixture. No private app code, local paths, screenshots, app-specific identifiers, or proprietary text were copied.
sourceQuestion: Did it separate design-system coherence findings from target-app implementation work?
